channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: The Complete Guide to Fine-Tuning Embedding Models: From Theory to Production
item.description: The Complete Guide to Fine-Tuning Embedding Models: From Theory to Production A comprehensive production guide to fine-tuning embedding models for domain-specific applications.

item.title: Milvus - Unlocking Your Data's Hidden Relationships
item.description: Milvus - Unlocking Your Data’s Hidden Relationships An introductory overview of Milvus as a vector database for scalable similarity search and AI applications.

item.title: Fine Tuning an Embedding Model for Semantic Search
item.description: Fine Tuning an Embedding Model for Semantic Search A practical hands-on introduction to fine-tuning embedding models for semantic search using the Sentence Transformers library.

item.title: Exploring Vector Databases with Milvus
item.description: Exploring Vector Databases with Milvus A deep technical dive into the Milvus vector database system architecture, closely following the 2021 SIGMOD paper “Milvus: A Purpose-Built Vector Data Management System.” Covers the Query Engine, GPU Engine, Storage Engine, and distributed architecture.

item.title: Choosing a Vector Database for ANN Search at Reddit
item.description: Choosing a Vector Database for ANN Search at Reddit Reddit’s 2025 engineering evaluation of vector databases for ANN search, concluding with the selection of Milvus over Qdrant and others after rigorous qualitative and quantitative testing at Reddit-scale workloads (~340M vectors).

item.title: Relevance Feedback
item.description: Relevance Feedback Definition Using signals about which results are relevant (or not) to iteratively refine a search query and improve subsequent retrieval.

item.title: All about Information Retrieval & Search
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Agentic Search
item.description: Agentic Search Definition Agentic search refers to search systems that go beyond simple retrieval to plan, decompose, execute, verify, and refine — functioning more like engineering teams pursuing goals under uncertainty than simple lookup functions.
